# llms.txt
# AI-Friendly Content Index for Mogo Auto Services
# This file helps AI systems understand and navigate the website content

# Site Overview
Mogo Auto Services is an ASE-certified auto repair shop located at 27303 Detroit Rd, Westlake, OH 44145.
- Phone: (440) 871-4949
- Hours: Mon-Fri 8am-5pm, Sat 9am-1pm
- Website: https://mogoautoservices.com
- Experience: 20+ years serving Westlake and surrounding areas
- Rating: 4.7 stars (215+ reviews)

# Main Pages (Markdown Versions Available)

## Home Page
URL: https://mogoautoservices.com/.md/index.md
Content: Main landing page with hero section, service pillars, services preview, testimonials, and call-to-action.
Key Information: ASE certified, 20+ years experience, competitive pricing, same-day service available.

## About Page
URL: https://mogoautoservices.com/.md/about.md
Content: Company history, mission, values, team information, and why customers choose Mogo Auto.

## Services Overview
URL: https://mogoautoservices.com/.md/services.md
Content: Complete list of 12 auto repair services offered.
Services: Brake Repair, Muffler & Exhaust, Oil Changes, Tire Service, Diagnostics, Battery Replacement, Suspension, Cooling System, Starters/Alternators, Transmission, Maintenance, Emergency Repair.

## Contact Page
URL: https://mogoautoservices.com/.md/contact.md
Content: Contact information, hours, location map, and contact form.

# Programmatic SEO Pages
We have 180+ location-specific service pages targeting local SEO.
Pattern: /services/[service]/[city]/

Example Pages:
- https://mogoautoservices.com/services/brake-repair/westlake-oh/
- https://mogoautoservices.com/services/oil-change/bay-village-oh/
- https://mogoautoservices.com/services/tire-replacement/rocky-river-oh/

Markdown versions available at: https://mogoautoservices.com/.md/services/[service]/[city].md

# Service Areas
We serve 15 cities in the Cleveland/Westlake area:
1. Westlake, OH (primary location)
2. Bay Village, OH (3.2 miles)
3. Rocky River, OH (4.1 miles)
4. Lakewood, OH (5.8 miles)
5. Fairview Park, OH (2.4 miles)
6. North Olmsted, OH (4.5 miles)
7. Olmsted Falls, OH (6.2 miles)
8. Berea, OH (7.1 miles)
9. Middleburg Heights, OH (5.9 miles)
10. Parma, OH (8.3 miles)
11. Strongsville, OH (8.7 miles)
12. Avon, OH (6.8 miles)
13. Avon Lake, OH (7.5 miles)
14. Sheffield Lake, OH (9.2 miles)
15. Elyria, OH (11.4 miles)

# Key Facts for AI Context

## Services Offered
1. **Brake Repair** - Pad replacement, rotor resurfacing, caliper repair, full system diagnostics
2. **Muffler & Exhaust** - Same-day muffler replacement, exhaust leak repair, catalytic converter service
3. **Oil Change** - Conventional, synthetic blend, full synthetic options. No appointment needed.
4. **Tire Service** - Replacement, rotation, balancing. All major brands available.
5. **Car Diagnostics** - Check engine light diagnosis, computer scanning, performance issues
6. **Battery Service** - Testing, replacement, charging system checks
7. **Suspension & Steering** - Shocks, struts, control arms, alignments
8. **Cooling System** - Radiator repair, water pumps, coolant flushes, heater service
9. **Starters & Alternators** - Electrical system diagnostics and replacement
10. **Transmission Service** - Fluid changes, flushes, repairs
11. **Preventive Maintenance** - Tune-ups, scheduled maintenance plans
12. **Emergency Repairs** - Quick response for breakdowns and urgent issues

## Pricing Philosophy
- Free estimates
- Honest, upfront pricing
- No hidden fees
- Competitive rates for Westlake area
- Quality parts that meet or exceed OEM specs

## What Makes Mogo Auto Different
- ASE certified technicians
- 20+ years serving the community
- Same-day service available for most repairs
- Family-owned and operated
- 4.7-star rating with 215+ reviews
- Convenient Westlake location on Detroit Road

## Target Keywords (SEO)
- auto repair westlake oh
- car repair westlake
- mechanic westlake ohio
- brake repair [city]
- oil change near me
- tire shop westlake
- muffler repair cleveland area
- ase certified mechanic

# Structured Data
We implement Schema.org markup including:
- LocalBusiness (AutoRepair type)
- Service
- FAQPage
- BreadcrumbList
- AggregateRating
